properties.name: Handlery Union Square Hotel
properties.description: Low-key quarters, some with balconies, in a refined hotel offering an outdoor pool & a restaurant.

properties.name: Hilton San Francisco Union Square
properties.description: Sophisticated lodging with an outdoor pool, a trendy restaurant & a cocktail bar with city views.

properties.name: Hotel Union Square
properties.description: A 1913 boutique option offering sleek rooms & suites, plus free evening wine receptions.

properties.name: The Andrews Hotel
properties.description: Cozy rooms in a Victorian hotel offering continental breakfast & an Italian restaurant.

properties.name: San Francisco Marriott Union Square
properties.description: Relaxed rooms & suites, some with city views, plus a bar, a fitness room & meeting rooms.

properties.name: Chancellor Hotel on Union Square
properties.description: Family-owned hotel dating from 1914, offering cozy rooms, free Wi-Fi & a restaurant.

properties.name: citizenM San Francisco Union Square
properties.description: High-tech rooms in a trendy hotel featuring a rooftop terrace, workspace & a cool 24/7 bar/cafe.

properties.name: The Inn at Union Square San Francisco
properties.description: Chic rooms & suites, some with pull-out sofas, in a cozy boutique hotel featuring meeting space.

properties.name: The Mosser Hotel
properties.description: Cozy quarters, some with en suite bathrooms, in an intimate 1913 hotel offering free Wi-Fi.

properties.name: Golden Gate Hotel, San Francisco
properties.description: Quaint, antiques-filled rooms in a 1913 hotel with free continental breakfast & Wi-Fi.

properties.name: Holiday Inn Express San Francisco Union Square, an IHG Hotel
properties.description: Bright rooms & suites in a low-key hotel with a free hot breakfast buffet & an exercise room.

properties.name: The Westin St. Francis San Francisco on Union Square
properties.description: Upscale grande dame hotel featuring relaxed rooms & suites, plus sophisticated dining & a luxe spa.

properties.name: Hotel Fusion
properties.description: Contemporary Asian-inspired rooms & suites, plus a restaurant, a trendy nightclub & free Wi-Fi.

properties.name: The Herbert Hotel
properties.description: Minimalist accommodations with shared or en suite bathrooms in a 1909 building with free Wi-Fi.

properties.name: Parc 55 San Francisco - a Hilton Hotel
properties.description: Airy rooms & suites with city views in a modern high-rise hotel with Thai & American restaurants.

properties.name: King George Hotel
properties.description: Circa-1914 hotel featuring cozy rooms with pillow-top mattresses & free Wi-Fi, plus an on-site bar.

properties.name: FOUND Hotel, San Francisco
properties.description: Contemporary, hip hotel featuring streamlined private rooms, plus a lobby lounge.

properties.name: Grand Hyatt San Francisco
properties.description: Sleek, high-rise business hotel offering free Wi-Fi, plus a bistro, bar, gym & conference space.
